phase_history.notes: Defined Nova Harmony as a vocal harmony engine for doubles, stacks, choir layers, and wide cinematic vocal textures using a simple macro control surface.
Planned voice-grouped harmony generation with style, key behavior, tone shaping, mud control, low-latency optimization, and Preview/Process quality switching.
Implemented a dark luxury flagship UI with animated harmony visualizer, macro knobs, style dropdown, right-side utility controls, and responsive neon-accent interaction.
Implemented JUCE processor, APVTS parameters, WebView editor bindings, intelligent voice grouping, gain scaling by 1/sqrt(voice_count), and dynamic harmony mixing flow.

framework_selection.rationale: WebView is the best fit for Nova Harmony because the product requires a premium, animated, high-contrast interface with live visual feedback and polished interaction details.
